app.name: DepScreen
app.disclaimer: Screening tool only — not a diagnostic instrument. In Bahrain, call 999 for emergencies.

auth.clinician_code_hint: Your therapist will provide this code to link your accounts.

screening.title: New Screening
screening.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to be screened. All methods analyze your text for DSM-5 depression symptoms.
screening.checkin_desc: Answer 9 structured questions aligned with DSM-5 criteria. Takes 3-5 minutes.
screening.social_media_desc: We analyze your public Reddit or X posts for mental health-related language patterns.
screening.upload_desc: Paste or upload text from a social media data export or journal entries.
screening.no_wrong_answers: You can be brief. There are no wrong answers.

results.severity_none: No DSM-5 depression symptoms were detected.
results.severity_mild: {{count}} symptom(s) detected. Below clinical threshold. Monitoring recommended.
results.severity_moderate: {{count}} symptoms detected. Approaching clinical threshold. Professional evaluation recommended.
results.severity_severe: {{count}} symptoms detected. Meets DSM-5 threshold. Prompt professional evaluation strongly recommended.
results.crisis_title: If you are in crisis — help is available now
results.crisis_body: In Bahrain, call 999 for an ambulance — you will be taken to the Salmaniya Medical Complex psychiatric emergency department.

chat.title: DepScreen Assistant
chat.subtitle: A supportive voice — not a replacement for professional care
chat.placeholder: Ask about your results or anything on your mind...

suggestions.severity: What does my severity level mean?

chat.empty: Ask questions about your screening results, or just share how you're feeling.
chat.standalone_empty: Chat about anything on your mind. You're safe here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.export_desc: Download all your screenings, chat history, and documents.
profile.deactivate_desc: Deactivating your account will prevent future logins. Your data will be preserved for your clinician's records.

empty_states.no_screenings: No screenings yet — whenever you're ready, we're here.
empty_states.no_conversations: Start a conversation whenever you'd like. We're here to listen.
empty_states.no_medications: No medications recorded. You can add them anytime.
empty_states.no_notifications: All caught up. Take a moment to breathe.
empty_states.no_patients: No patients linked yet. Share your clinician code to get started.
